## What's new

Narrative overview of the release: what it ships, why it matters, what direction it moves the project in.
2–4 sentences. Mention any notable design iteration or stabilization that happened before the cut.

## Changelog

<!--
Snapshot of the release — describe the end state, not the history.
Group by component or area. Each entry names what's there, not what PR added it.

Do NOT:
- List PRs by title or reference PR numbers
- Use PR type prefixes (Enhancement, Refactor, Cleanup…)
- Describe individual commits or intermediate steps

Example structure:

### Component name
- What it is and what it does (one line per distinct thing)
- Another item in this component

### Another component
- ...
-->

### Checklist

- [ ] Version bumped in relevant files
- [ ] Changelog complete
- [ ] Documentation up to date
